title: SimpleScoreBoard
description: A really simple scoreboard plugin, just for the simplicity.
body:
![SimpleScoreBoard Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e5792c54427a0efae3fbcdde9befbce7e90b7f9.png)

SimpleScoreBoard

A really simple scoreboard plugin, just for the simplicity.

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/347679658369613826?style=for-the-badge&logo=DISCORD&logoColor=%23fff&color=%235762d6)](https://go.happyareabean.cc/supportdiscord) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/%24-Donate-ff69b4?style=for-the-badge)](https://ko-fi.com/happyareabean) ## Key Features * MiniMessage format support * PlaceholderAPI format support * Update Interval * Lightweight * Easy to config — [scoreboard.yml](https://github.com/HappyAreaBean/SimpleScoreBoard/blob/main/src/main/resources/scoreboard.yml) ## Credits SimpleScoreBoard would not be possible without these open source projects. ❤️ - [FastBoard](https://github.com/MrMicky-FR/FastBoard) - [boosted-yml](https://github.com/dejvokep/boosted-yaml) - [Lamp](https://github.com/Revxrsal/lamp) ## Support ## You may also like... - [SimpleJoinMessage](https://modrinth.com/plugin/sjm) - A simple plugin to send message when player join w/ MiniMessage and PlaceholderAPI supported! - [SimpleJumpPads](https://modrinth.com/plugin/sjp) - Simple and feature packed jump pads plugin for your server! ## License MIT ## Metrics SimpleScoreBoard use [bStats](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/SimpleScoreBoard/26449) to collect metrics. [What is bStats?](https://bstats.org/docs/server-owners)
